subject: The JB.AI Weekly #2: How to calculate the cost of missed calls for your busi...
focus: How AI Voice Bots help local service businesses never miss a call
spotlight: 🌐 General — AI Benefits for Any Business

sections.mainTip:
Here's how to calculate what those missed calls are actually costing your business.

• **Track your missed call volume** – Check your phone system logs or ask your team to count unanswered calls for one week, then multiply by 52 for your annual total.

• **Estimate your conversion rate** – Most local service businesses convert 20-30% of callers into paying customers, so use 25% as your baseline calculation.

• **Calculate average job value** – Add up your last 20 jobs and divide by 20 to get your average customer value per transaction.

• **Do the math** – Multiply missed calls × conversion rate × average job value. A plumber missing 5 calls daily at $300 average jobs loses $113,750 annually.

• **Factor in lifetime value** – Happy customers typically return 2-3 times, so multiply your total by 2.5 for the real impact.

• **Consider AI voice bots** – They answer every call 24/7, converting missed opportunities into booked appointments automatically.
sections.newsRoundup:
# This Week in AI

**SoundHound AI Acquires LivePerson to Create Omnichannel Voice Platform**
SoundHound AI acquired LivePerson to combine voice AI technology with digital messaging capabilities that process one billion customer messages monthly, targeting $500M in revenue across 30+ countries.
• Why it matters: This consolidation signals voice AI infrastructure is becoming standardized and accessible, potentially lowering costs for small businesses implementing automated phone systems.

**G2 Research: 51% of B2B Buyers Now Start with AI Chatbots**
New research shows B2B software buyers increasingly begin their purchasing process with AI chatbots rather than search engines, with 69% changing vendor choices based on chatbot guidance.
• Why it matters: Small businesses risk losing qualified leads if they're not discoverable through AI platforms where customers now start their buying journey.

**Newo.ai Raises $25M for SMB Voice AI Front-Desk Operations**
The startup secured Series A funding to provide AI receptionists handling calls, SMS, and WhatsApp for small businesses, with one orthodontics practice generating an additional $400,000 quarterly.
• Why it matters: Real ROI case studies prove voice AI is moving from experimental to revenue-generating for small business operations.
sections.toolOfWeek:
🛠️ **Calendly** — Seamlessly turn chatbot conversations into booked appointments.

• Integrates with AI chatbots to automatically schedule meetings, consultations, and service appointments based on real-time availability
• A dental office's chatbot can instantly book cleaning appointments while answering insurance questions, reducing phone tag by 80%
• Set buffer times between AI-scheduled appointments to account for prep work and avoid back-to-back booking stress
sections.statOfWeek:
📊 **Small businesses with fewer than 50 employees are adopting chatbots at a 25.1% compound annual growth rate, the fastest of any business segment** — [Nextiva](https://www.nextiva.com/blog/conversational-ai-statistics.html)

• Your competitors are racing ahead - small and medium enterprises are growing AI adoption faster than large companies
• You're not alone - 40% of chatbot-using companies are small businesses with under 250 employees  
• Time to act - 64% of small businesses plan to adopt chatbots by 2026, creating massive competitive pressure
sections.spotlight:
**Why AI Bots Matter for Every Business**

Every missed customer interaction is money walking out the door.

• **Hidden drain:** Businesses lose an average of $62,000 annually from missed calls alone
• **24/7 lead machine:** AI chatbots capture qualified prospects while you sleep, converting 35% more visitors into leads
• **Phone tag killer:** AI voice bots handle scheduling, follow-ups, and basic inquiries instantly—no more endless back-and-forth
• **Time = money:** Save 5 hours weekly on routine tasks = $15,000+ in recovered productivity per employee annually

Stop letting profit slip through the cracks—automate the basics, focus on growth.
